title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 16 July 2024.

items.title: A pre-release build of **Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2** has leaked
bullets: The sequel isn't scheduled for release until September
In late June, Saber and Focus said a Space Marine 2 open beta had been cancelled to focus on optimization, polish and bug fixing
Earlier this month, Focus announced the game had "gone gold"

items.title: **Moomins** coming to Journey dev's **Sky: Children of the Light **this year
bullets: Animated series The Two Embers due 2025

items.title: **Elden Ring DLC Shadow of the Erdtree** removes Latin American translation staff from credits
bullets: The revised credits now fully credit translators from Europe. Localisation staff have been listed, as well as a Special Thanks including all individual translators, all under Bandai Namco Europe

bullets.text: However, Latin America and Thai translators are only listed by the name of the agency, unlike those for Chinese and Korean

bullets: The original credits for the game credits Brazilian Portuguese and Latin American Spanish translators individually, but the new credits remove these names and instead includes a generic Special Thanks message.

items.title: **Crash Bandicoot** artist claims a fifth game was cancelled
bullets: "Some day folks will hear about the Crash 5 that never was, and it’s gonna break hearts”
